caption: The video concludes with a series of closing frames, indicating the end of an ORCA Media presentation. The first frame displays a black background with white text that reads, "This Has Been an ORCA Media Presentation," centered on the screen. This is followed by another black frame with contact information for ORCA Media, including their website (www.orcamedia.net), phone number (802-224-9901), and hashtag (#orcamediavt), all presented in white text. These frames serve as a professional conclusion to the presentation, providing viewers with ways to connect with or learn more about ORCA Media. The overall tone is formal and informative, ensuring that the audience has all necessary details to engage further with the company.
